pattern: Walking the matrix along anti-diagonals while flipping the traversal direction on each successive diagonal produces the zig-zag diagonal order.
hints: Cells on one anti-diagonal share the same row-plus-column sum.
Group cells by that sum, in increasing order of the sum.
Emit each diagonal alternately top-to-bottom and bottom-to-top to get the zig-zag effect.

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    cap = max(1, min(100, size))
    rows = rng.randint(1, cap)
    cols = rng.randint(1, cap)
    m = [[rng.randint(-100000, 100000) for _ in range(cols)] for _ in range(rows)]
    return [m]
